after_seconds.title: After Seconds

checkpoint_during.description: Whether to persist checkpoints during the run.

command.description: Resume an interrupted graph (update/resume/goto). Takes precedence over ``input`` when both are given.

config.description: Config passed through to the graph invocation.

context.description: Context passed through to the graph invocation.

durability.description: When checkpoints are written relative to graph steps.

feedback_keys.description: Feedback keys to associate with the run.

ThreadPatchRequest.description:
Mutable fields updatable on an existing thread.

``metadata`` is optional so an empty body is a no-op; send
``{"metadata": {}}`` to intentionally clear a thread's metadata.
